global_context.scene_description: A photorealistic top-down kitchen-table scene showing two HVAC quote documents laid side-by-side on a warm wood surface. Both documents are clearly printed letterhead-style quotes with similar layout and identical line items. The left quote document has a generic corporate-looking header at the top and shows a large total dollar amount of $14,200 in bold black at the bottom. The right quote document has a simpler family-business-looking header and shows a total of $9,500 in bold black at the bottom. A coffee mug rests in the upper-left corner of the frame, partially in shadow. A pair of reading glasses rests near the right document. Soft warm morning light comes from the upper-right, casting gentle shadows. The image conveys quiet kitchen-table comparison, the moment a homeowner does the math. Top 18% of frame is reserved for headline overlay. Bottom 14% reserved for red CTA banner overlay. Mood: quiet, contemplative, financial.

lighting.source: soft window light from upper right
lighting.direction: from upper right, raking across the documents

composition.framing: medium close, both documents fill the central 70% of the frame
composition.depth_of_field: deep, both documents in sharp focus
composition.focal_point: the two large total amounts at the bottom of each document — $14,200 and $9,500
composition.notes: top 18% of frame reserved for headline overlay (open table surface above the documents); bottom 14% reserved for red CTA banner overlay (open table surface below the documents)

objects.label: left quote document — big corporate company

visual_attributes.color: white paper, black ink, generic corporate header in dark blue

micro_details: a generic corporate-style logo placeholder at the top (no real brand)
line items showing 'Trane System', 'Installation Labor', 'Permits' with dollar amounts beside each
the total $14,200 is bold and underlined at the bottom-right of the page

objects.label: right quote document — local family business

visual_attributes.color: white paper, black ink, simpler red-and-blue local header

micro_details: a simpler family-business-style header at the top (no real brand name)
the same line items as the left document — 'Trane System', 'Installation Labor', 'Permits' — with smaller dollar amounts beside each
the total $9,500 is bold and underlined at the bottom-right of the page, in green ink

objects.label: reading glasses
objects.location: between and slightly to the right of the documents
micro_details: folded, lying on the wood surface

semantic_relationships: the two documents are mirror compositions — same line items, drastically different totals — emphasizing the only real difference is the markup
the coffee mug and glasses establish this is a real homeowner's kitchen-table moment, not a sales pitch
morning light feels intimate, calm, decision-making time
